LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.label: SpeakUp chatter
LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.instruction: ordinary SpeakUp conversation - treat it as chitchat unless the pair's mood, need, or relationship tension makes the small moment land harder
LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.instructions.0: SpeakUp chatter - use the supplied line if present; otherwise write low-stakes back-and-forth without inventing a quote
LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.instructions.1: SpeakUp chatter - focus on the feeling under the small talk: ease, awkwardness, pressure, or distance
LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.instructions.2: SpeakUp chatter - let the ordinary rhythm matter only if the pawn's state makes it matter
LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.tones.0: loose and conversational, like ordinary talk passing through the room
LanguageData.speakup_chitchat.tones.1: plain and observant, letting tiny social pressure carry the weight
